title: Multiple times zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out via circle button remains stable across all screens on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) icon to open it
Tap the circle button to zoom in
Tap the circle button again to zoom out
Navigate to each screen within the QSG (e.g., swipe left/right through all pages)
On each QSG screen, repeat steps 4-5 multiple times
expected: The app remains stable with no crashes or freezes. The zoom in/out functionality works correctly on every QSG screen, and the circle button responds consistently each time it is tapped.
